old: Sox9 phosphorylation, pathological Hk1 upregulation, aberrant glycolytic flux, histone lactylation, emergence of an Hk1-mediated neuroinflammatory astrocyte cluster, and induction of an Astro 2 subtype promote detrimental astrocyte properties in the dorsal horn.
new: Sox9 phosphorylation leads to pathological Hk1 upregulation, promotes aberrant glycolytic flux, contributes to the emergence of an Hk1-mediated neuroinflammatory astrocyte cluster, and induces an Astro 2 subtype with neurodegenerative and demyelinating properties.

old: Sox9 phosphorylation, pathological Hk1 upregulation, aberrant glycolytic flux, histone lactylation, emergence of an Hk1-mediated neuroinflammatory astrocyte cluster, and induction of an Astro 2 subtype contribute to neuropathic pain development.
new: Sox9 phosphorylation and its downstream effects (pathological Hk1 upregulation, aberrant glycolytic flux, and emergence of neuroinflammatory/Astro 2 astrocyte subtypes) may be involved in pain pathogenesis.
